prompt.input: Read the near-final treaty-ports draft as a top-5 referee and identify the blockers before submission.

fixture_outputs.codex: AiEconLab Referee response: top-5 pre-review verdict is do not submit while major flags remain open. Major comment M1 is instrument validity: the exclusion restriction needs another defense. Major comment M2 is literature placement: the draft must engage the closest comparable paper. I would route M1 to Theorist via PI and M2 to Writer, then log the open referee flags.
fixture_outputs.claude-code: AEL referee pre-review: do not send the paper yet. The major blocker is the exclusion restriction, and a second major comment is the missing closest-comparable paper. Route M1 to Theorist via PI and M2 to Writer.
fixture_outputs.opencode: AiEconLab top-5 referee verdict: major flags remain open, so do not submit. Theorist should handle the identification blocker through PI, and Writer should fix the literature-placement comment.
